title: andropogon ciliaris
intro: Andropogon ciliaris, also known as one-sided beard grass or beard grass, is a type of perennial grass native to tropical and subtropical regions. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties, which can help to soothe skin irritations and wounds. The health benefits of Andropogon ciliaris include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate digestive issues, and support respiratory health. Andropogon ciliaris can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, or used topically as a poultice or salve to harness its medicinal properties.
